title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 1.
content:
There was an Old Man with a beard,
    Who said, "It is just as I feared! -
    Two Owls and a Hen,
    Four Larks and a Wren,
    Have all built their nests in my beard!"
meaning: About: Edward Lear was an English artist, illustrator and writer known for his literary nonsense, in poetry and prose, and especially his limericks, a form which he popularised.
